name: Differential Gene Expression
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /var/lib/rstudio-server /var/run/rstudio-server && sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y libglpk-dev && Rscript -e "install.packages(c('ggrepel', 'pheatmap', 'msigdbr', 'igraph')); BiocManager::install(c('DESeq2', 'clusterProfiler', 'enrichplot'), ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)"
